title: LZRinue 100 Sheets Pink Tissue Paper, 70 x 50 cm Gift Wrapping Paper for Gift Wrapping Art Crafts DIY Birthday Wedding Wrap
features: Quantity: There are 100pcs pink tissue paper in the package, it's enough to meet your different decoration needs and make your gift more gorgeous.
Ideal for Gift Wrapping: Solid pink tissue paper are a good choice for wrapping gifts and suitable for any occasion. It will add more festive atmosphere for your party.
Size: each sheet of tissue paper measures about 70 x 50 cm/ 27.6 x 19.7 inches, it's large enough to wrap and DIY many gifts.
Easy to Use: The tissue paper are made of high quality tissue material, it's not easy to tear and easy to cut, shape and fold based on your requirements.

Wide Application: Suitable for Christmas, Thanksgiving Day, Valentine's day, birthday party, wedding party, bridal shower, baby shower, wrapping festival gifts, gift baskets or bags, making crafts and arts, etc.
description: Features and Benefits: Multi color packaging paper is made of 17g paper, which is not easy to tear, has high glossiness, and is easy to bend, fold, bond, and cut. Widely used, it can be used to package gift bags such as wine bottles, handbags, clothes, jewelry, etc. It can be used to package gift bags and decorate handicrafts, and can be used to achieve your various creativity and inspiration Size: 50*70cm Colors: Black, Light Blue, Green, White, Pink, Kraft, Dark Blue, Red Material: Paper Reminder: The packaging paper is folded during delivery and will inevitably have creases. If you mind, please purchase with caution

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Gift wrapping, crafts, packaging gift bags, decorating handicrafts
